headline: Should Dividend Hike And Growth Plans For Williams (WMB) Require Action From Investors?
summary: In recent weeks, Williams Companies increased its quarterly dividend by 5% to US$0.525 per share and reported record FY2025 adjusted EBITDA of US$7.75 billion, while Q4 2025 earnings per share came in slightly below analyst expectations. The company’s combination of a higher dividend, long-running payment history, and analyst-backed growth plans in natural gas infrastructure has reinforced its image as an income-focused operator with exposure to evolving power and LNG demand. Now we’ll...

headline: Is Williams Companies (WMB) Pricing Look Stretched After Strong Multi Year Share Price Run
summary: If you are wondering whether Williams Companies at around US$74.24 is giving you fair value or asking too much, you are not alone. The stock shows a 0.6% decline over the last 7 days, but sits at 11.7% over 30 days, 22.0% year to date and 41.2% over 1 year, with a very large 3 year return and a roughly 4x return over 5 years that may influence how the market is currently pricing it. Recent commentary on Williams Companies has focused on its role in the US energy infrastructure space and how...
